testcase.name: test_warehouse_manager_can_issue_debit_note
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter7_warehouse_dn_and_stock.py:55: in test_warehouse_manager_can_issue_debit_note assert issue.status_code == 200, f"warehouse_manager issue failed (expected 200 after fix): {issue.status_code} {issue.text}" E AssertionError: warehouse_manager issue failed (expected 200 after fix): 403 {"detail":"Insufficient permissions"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
